heroHeadline: Chernobyl: 40 Years After the Worst Nuclear Disaster in History
heroSubtitle: Reactor No. 4 exploded on 26 April 1986 — the exclusion zone endures, 600,000 liquidators deployed, and the legacy remains deeply contested.
footerNote: Data sourced from IAEA, UNSCEAR, WHO, Ukrainian government archives, Soviet/Russian state archives, Chernobyl Forum (2005), TORCH Report (2006), and peer-reviewed research.
